use serde::Deserialize;
use std::borrow::Cow;

// GOOD: borrowed or Cow fields for readonly payload
#[derive(Deserialize)]
struct ApiResponse<'a> {
    id: Cow<'a, str>,
    name: Cow<'a, str>,
    description: Cow<'a, str>,
    tags: Vec<Cow<'a, str>>,
    metadata: Cow<'a, str>,
}

#[derive(Deserialize)]
struct EventPayload<'a> {
    #[serde(borrow)]
    event_type: &'a str,
    #[serde(borrow)]
    source: &'a str,
    #[serde(borrow)]
    data: &'a str,
    #[serde(borrow)]
    timestamp: &'a str,
}

fn process_response(json: &str) -> Result<ApiResponse<'_>, Error> {
    let response: ApiResponse = serde_json::from_str(json)?;
    println!("{}: {}", response.name, response.description);
    Ok(response)
}
